courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Three-Color Tides
genericDescription: Communicate with limited assets; establish hierarchy through spacing, motion, contrast, and rhythm; remove nonessential information.
specificDescription: A three-color avoidance game where spacing, tempo, and motion hierarchy carry all readability without ornament.
gradingRubric: 30 pts clarity under constraint; 20 pts cohesive minimalist style; 20 pts complete design; 15 pts player comprehension; 15 pts notes.
